features.title: PRD Store Integration with Dual-Write and First-Run Migration

tasks.title: Add regression test for ndx add stability after markdown migration
tasks.description: After the markdown-first PRD storage migration, ndx add was observed to crash in post-migration environments. This task adds a targeted regression test that initializes a legacy prd.json project, runs the migration to prd.md, then invokes ndx add with a sample description and asserts it exits cleanly without crashing, preventing recurrence of this failure mode.
acceptanceCriteria: Test scaffolds a project with legacy prd.json format, runs migration to prd.md, then invokes ndx add with a sample description
Test asserts ndx add exits with code 0 (no crash) in a post-migration project directory
Test asserts the resulting PRD contains the newly added item without data corruption or loss of pre-migration items
Test is registered in the integration or e2e suite and executes in CI on each PR

matchedItem.title: Add regression test for ndx add CLI delegation

duplicateReason.explanation: Matches completed task "Add regression test for ndx add CLI delegation".
